ItacPersonItem.Notes: `Maestro di Sacra Teologia`. Parisotti devised the emblem of the Argonauti, according to Denis E. Cosgrove, Apollo`s Eye (2001), he was called `storiografo dell`Accademia` in Coronelli`s Historia del Regno di Negroponte. More information on him in Isidoro Gatti, Il P. Vincenzo Coronelli dei Frati Minori Conventuali... (1976)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
